roundup.title: Sakana Fugu & GLM-5.2 Lead Agent Labs Wave
roundup.subtitle: 多代理编排系统与开源前沿模型集中发布
headline: @SakanaAILabs 发布 Fugu 多代理编排系统，单 API 调用即可访问 Fugu Ultra 模型，性能对标 Fable 与 Mythos，同时规避出口管制风险。@ValsAI 同时公布 GLM-5.2 在全榜单排名第 8，超越 Gemini 3.5 Flash。
@AnthropicAI 完成 Frontier Red Team Phase 2，Opus 4.7 独立完成 robodog 编程任务，速度比去年人类团队快约 20 倍。@matei_zaharia 同步更新 Omnigent 0.2，集成 Cursor CLI 与多沙箱提供商。
@vllm_project 与 @poolsideai 共同推动 Laguna M.1 上线，vLLM v0.21.0 实现 Day-0 支持，标志开源 agentic coding 模型进入生产部署阶段。@UnslothAI 则把 GLM-5.2 量化至 2-bit，Mac 本地运行成为可能。
@togethercompute 部署 NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 集群，专为大规模推理优化；@cursor_ai 推出 /automate 技能，让代理可一键配置触发器与工具链。

deepDives.title: Sakana Fugu 多代理编排系统发布
deepDives.summary: Sakana 推出单 API 调用的全栈多代理系统，强调编排而非单一巨模型，性能对标行业前沿。

facts.text: Fugu Ultra 模型在工程、科学与推理基准上与 Fable、Mythos 持平。
facts.quote: Fugu stands shoulder-to-shoulder with leading models like Fable and Mythos

facts.text: 系统通过单一模型 API 提供完整多代理编排能力。
facts.quote: A full multi-agent orchestration system accessible via a single model API

bullish.text: 下一代方向是编排而非更大模型

deepDives.title: GLM-5.2 开源模型与本地部署优化
deepDives.summary: Z.ai 发布 GLM-5.2，在公开 leaderboard 进入前沿梯队，多家工具链快速支持本地量化运行。

facts.text: GLM-5.2 在全榜单排名第 8，超过 Gemini 3.5 Flash。
facts.quote: GLM 5.2 scores higher than Gemini 3.5 Flash! ... ranks 8th

facts.text: 2-bit 量化后体积从 1.51TB 降至 238GB，准确率保留约 82%。
facts.quote: The 2-bit model retains ~82% accuracy after we shrunk it from 1.51TB to 238GB (-84% size)

bullish.text: 目前最强开源模型，可直接在 256GB Mac 运行

bullets.text: Omnigent 0.2 集成 Cursor CLI 与多沙箱提供商
LangSmith LLM Gateway 可防止代理单夜消耗超 $10k
bullets.quote: Your agents can burn through $10k overnight

bullets.text: Laguna M.1 为 225B 稀疏 MoE，23B 活跃参数，256K 上下文
bullets.quote: 70-layer sparse MoE: 225B total params, 23B active per token, 256K context

bullets.text: Cohere North Mini Code 4-bit 量化版支持 Mac 本地运行
Together AI 部署 NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 推理集群
Cloudflare Workers 支持代理秒级部署临时实例

topTweets.author: @SakanaAILabs
topTweets.text: Fugu Ultra 单 API 多代理系统性能对标 Fable 与 Mythos
topTweets.whyItMatters: 下一代 agent 方向从单模型转向编排系统

topTweets.author: @ValsAI
topTweets.text: GLM-5.2 登顶公开 leaderboard 第 8，超越 Gemini 3.5 Flash
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开源模型首次进入前沿竞争序列

topTweets.author: @AnthropicAI
topTweets.text: Opus 4.7 独立完成 robodog 编程，速度提升 20 倍
topTweets.whyItMatters: 展示 agent 在真实硬件编程任务上的实用性

topTweets.author: @UnslothAI
topTweets.text: GLM-5.2 2-bit 量化后仅 238GB，可在 Mac 上运行
topTweets.whyItMatters: 前沿开源模型本地化部署门槛大幅降低

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.text: vLLM v0.21.0 Day-0 支持 Laguna M.1 225B MoE 模型
topTweets.whyItMatters: 加速开源 coding agent 生产落地

takeaways: 多代理编排系统正成为新默认架构，单 API 调用即可获得前沿能力。
GLM-5.2 等开源模型已达 1M 上下文 + MIT 许可，本地量化部署成本显著下降。
Agent 框架需重点关注成本网关与沙箱隔离，避免单夜高额消耗。
vLLM、Ollama 等推理引擎对新 MoE 模型的 Day-0 支持速度加快。
硬件侧 GB300 NVL72 与消费级 Mac 集群并行发展，推理部署选择更多样。

items.author: @fal
items.text: Happy Horse 1.1 is now live on fal! Generate video with synchronized native audio and multilingual lip-sync. Text to Video, Image to Video and Reference to Video options.
items.whyItMatters: 视频生成模型 1.1 版，支持音频同步与多语言唇同步。

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: Introducing Sakana Fugu: A full multi-agent orchestration system accessible via a single model API. Our ‘Fugu Ultra’ model matches the performance of Fable and Mythos, delivering frontier capability without the risk of export controls. Try it: https://sakana.ai/fugu/ 🐡
items.whyItMatters: 新型多代理编排系统，单API调用前沿模型池，规避出口管制风险。

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: Fugu stands shoulder-to-shoulder with leading models like Fable and Mythos across the industry's most rigorous engineering, scientific, and reasoning benchmarks. Read the full blog: https://sakana.ai/fugu-release/
items.whyItMatters: 基准表现媲美顶级模型，强调编排而非单一大模型的下一代方向。

items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: The next generation of inference needs purpose-built infrastructure. Together AI and 5C are deploying NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 systems with high-density compute, advanced cooling, and AI-optimized storage for large-scale inference and reasoning.
items.whyItMatters: 部署NVIDIA GB300 NVL72高密度集群，专为大规模推理优化。

items.author: @HuggingPapers
items.text: PerceptionDLM: parallel region perception with diffusion VLMs. ByteDance & Peking University introduce a multimodal diffusion model that captions multiple masked regions simultaneously—achieving up to 3.4× speedup over autoregressive methods on dense multi-region tasks.
items.whyItMatters: 扩散VLM并行多区域感知，密集任务提速3.4倍，开源权重数据。

items.author: @emollick
items.text: A fundamental problem with extending Codex/Cowork/Code to all knowledge work is that they remain very 'software-brained'... For a lot of other knowledge work, the process is at least as important as the outcome... This makes long-running models like Fable hard to use for deep knowledge work.
items.whyItMatters: 指出Agent工具在非编码知识工作中的核心局限

items.author: @tszzl
items.text: this hasn’t been true since GPT-3, and really not true for any model trained after GPT4. GPT4 base has some sort of self conception
items.whyItMatters: GPT-4 base 模型已具备自我概念，更新模型能力认知

items.author: @garrytan
items.text: I think one underestimated thing when we look back on it was how useful it is to have your own personal brain and company brain in 2026 at the dawn of usable AGI
items.whyItMatters: 开源 GBrain：AGI 时代个人/公司上下文脑

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: how to get your company ready for AI workflows (with checklist) structured data, clean SOPs, templates, mapped data flows, one place that tracks every tool and subscription. the least exciting work in a company, and the exact thing blocking its AI.
items.whyItMatters: 详细 checklist 帮助 AI 工程师构建可靠 agent 工作流基础

items.author: @ThePrimeagen
items.text: i have been doing some research too! I have created a rendering mechanism for my game that outputs everything to json and is replayable. commands can come in from the command line (may just go mcp on this) ... My goal is to make it so that I can loop the game and have an agent play the game 1000 times
items.whyItMatters: 实际案例展示 agent looping 用于 fuzz/测试游戏，MCP 相关

items.author: @github
items.text: Weekends are for building. Copilot Max users, check your account for an extra $200 in credits to power your next build in the GitHub Copilot app. Stand by for more offers for Pro and Pro+ users.
items.whyItMatters: Copilot Max 用户获额外 $200 credits

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: Over the last two weeks, both the U.S. Government and Anthropic took significant actions that demonstrated their power to control access to AI by restricting what others can do with frontier models... This move represents a raw demonstration of power by Anthropic... the incentive of others to invest more in alternative
items.whyItMatters: 分析前沿模型访问限制，推动开源与主权AI讨论

items.author: @googledevs
items.text: Deploy local coding agents directly on your laptop with Google Gemma open models → https://discord.com/invite/ahGXGZDw?event=1514645144786309233&utm_source=dev_eco&utm_medium=online_discord
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 支持本地 coding agents，离线执行与机器人动作。

items.author: @Cloudflare
items.text: Today we're rolling out Temporary Accounts on Cloudflare Workers. Any agent can now run wrangler deploy — temporary and get a live Worker in seconds.
items.whyItMatters: Agent 可秒级部署临时 Worker，简化推理/ serving 流程。

items.author: @mustafasuleyman
items.text: "In the application of AI, healthcare is going to be the next big product-market-fit explosion." More on the future of healthcare and our collaboration with the Mayo Clinic...
items.whyItMatters: 微软 AI 医疗 PMF 爆发，Mayo Clinic 合作信号

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: We just released Omnigent 0.2 with a ton of improvements from the past 5 days! ... Major additions are @cursor_ai CLI and @antigravity harnesses, lots of new sandbox providers, and secret-free sandboxing via API proxy.
items.whyItMatters: Agent框架0.2版更新，集成Cursor CLI与沙箱，支持自主工作流

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: Jensen Huang’s simplest explanation of an AI agent: a worker in a workshop. The model thinks. The harness gives it form. Tools and skills let it act. And the runtime gives the agent a place to get work done.
items.whyItMatters: Jensen 简洁拆解 Agent 四大组件

items.author: @OpenAINewsroom
items.text: For families facing rare genetic diseases, answers can be hard to find. @HallieJackson spoke live with @_perloj and Dr. Catherine Brownstein about the new NEJM AI paper and our work with Boston Children’s Hospital, where experts used o3 Deep Research to help diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children.
items.whyItMatters: o3 Deep Research 辅助罕见病诊断

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: GLM 5.2 scores higher than Gemini 3.5 Flash! @Zai_org is now competing with frontier models. On the full leaderboard, GLM 5.2 ranks 8th, ahead of GPT 5.3 Codex, GPT 5.2, Gemini 3.5 Flash...
items.whyItMatters: 开源模型 GLM 5.2 在 leaderboard 上进入前沿，值得关注性能提升

items.author: @saranormous
items.text: $INTC CEO @LipBuTan1 in new interview on his Foundry bet, and why we must make semis in the United States. full interview: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=asCgCv2XB4s
items.whyItMatters: Intel Foundry 战略与美国半导体制造，对 AI infra 供应链关键

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: We trained models with reinforcement learning on realistic conversations to reinforce beneficial traits like truthfulness, humility under uncertainty, openness to correction, fairness, and concern for human welfare, across 12 domains, including health, science, and education.
items.whyItMatters: 新对齐训练方法，跨域泛化提升模型可靠性

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: New Frontier Red Team blog: Phase 2 of Project Fetch, where we test how well Claude can program a robodog. Opus 4.7, on its own, was ~20x faster than last year's best human team aided by Opus 4.1.
items.whyItMatters: Claude 编程机器人能力大幅提升，展示 agent 实际应用

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Introducing /automate, a skill for agents to set up automations for you. Describe your task in plain language. Cursor configures the triggers, instructions, and tools.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor 新自动化功能，简化 AI coding agent 部署

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: 🎉 Congrats to @poolsideai on Laguna M.1, a new open-weights agentic coding model. Day-0 support landed in vLLM v0.21.0. 70-layer sparse MoE: 225B total params, 23B active per token, 256K context
items.whyItMatters: vLLM 快速支持新开源 coding 模型，加速本地部署

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: Your agents can burn through $10k overnight before you notice. LangSmith LLM Gateway stops that. https://www.langchain.com/blog/introducing-llm-gateway
items.whyItMatters: LangSmith 新网关功能，控制 agent 成本与安全

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: Our data shows that the vast majority of issues don't stem from bad intent. They usually happen because an agent misinterprets a command or gets overly enthusiastic to achieve a goal. Understanding these nuances is critical for refining safety and security protocols. ⬇️
items.whyItMatters: 多代理系统安全框架，AI工程师必关注

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Introducing Brain in Computer. Brain is a continuously learning memory system. Every task on Computer plugs into a context graph built by Brain. It makes Computer more stateful with every run. Available as a research preview for all Perplexity Max subscribers.
items.whyItMatters: Agent记忆系统Bench提升25%，实用性强

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: New in Claude Code: Artifacts. Interactive pages built from your session, like a PR walkthrough or a living project dashboard, shared with your team at a private link. Available in beta on Team and Enterprise plans.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code新Artifacts功能，提升团队协作

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: GLM-5.2 can now be run locally!🔥 The 2-bit model retains ~82% accuracy after we shrunk it from 1.51TB to 238GB (-84% size). Run on a 256GB Mac or RAM/VRAM setups. GLM-5.2 is the strongest open model to date.
items.whyItMatters: GLM-5.2本地运行优化，84%体积压缩

items.author: @cohere
items.text: We just dropped three updates that make North Mini Code more accessible than ever ⬇️ The 4-bit quant is now available, making our first open-source agentic coding model small enough to be run on a Mac. Get the weights here: https://huggingface.co/CohereLabs/North-Mini-Code-1.0-w4a16
items.whyItMatters: 开源 agentic coding 模型量化版发布，支持本地/Mac 运行

items.author: @cohere
items.text: North Mini Code is now supported on @ollama. Now, run our model locally, and use it with Codex, OpenClaw, and more. Download it here: https://ollama.com/library/north-mini-code-1.0
items.whyItMatters: Ollama 支持本地运行开源 coding 模型

items.author: @allen_ai
items.text: AISquared fine-tuned Bolt, a family of open-weight small language models, from Olmo. Domyn took a different route, building Domyn-Small, a 10B open-weight reasoning model, on its own Italia 10B base + our open Dolma & Dolci datasets. In AISquared's platform, Bolt now handles request routing & acts as a policy guardrail
items.whyItMatters: 开放数据集 Dolci 在 GPQA-Diamond 提升 10.1 分

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: New course: Add voice to your AI agents and applications... You'll build three types of voice-enabled applications: a voice-interactive game... an agent that gains a voice in about 10 lines of code... an agent that places outbound phone calls.
items.whyItMatters: 教AI工程师快速为Agent添加可靠语音功能

items.author: @JeffDean
items.text: My @Google colleagues... recently wrote a paper... 'Google's Training Supercomputers from TPU v2 to Ironwood'... ~30X more energy efficient per flop... 256 chips (TPUv2) to 9216 chips (Ironwood) per pod. Read the full paper:
items.whyItMatters: 详解TPU五代演进，性能/能效/规模数据对推理硬件选型关键

items.author: @danielhanchen
items.text: GLM-5.2 can now be run locally!🔥 The 2-bit model retains ~82% accuracy after we shrunk it from 1.51TB to 238GB (-84% size). Run on a 256GB Mac... GLM 5.2 dynamic 1-bit GGUF one shot Flappy Bird with 0 syntax errors whilst being 86% smaller!
items.whyItMatters: 强开源模型本地量化部署，准确率与尺寸实测数据

items.author: @googledevs
items.text: Build secure agentic workflows without iframe lag. Combining Agent to User Interface and Model Context Protocol Apps balances native rendering with custom iframe flexibility.
items.whyItMatters: A2UI + MCP 实现安全 agentic workflow，新架构信号。

items.author: @fal
items.text: Rodin v2.5 is now live on fal! PBR materials and HD textures. Production-ready 3D from text or up to 5 reference images.
items.whyItMatters: Rodin v2.5 3D 生成升级，支持 PBR 与多参考图。

items.author: @ID_AA_Carmack
items.text: Paper review: You Don’t Need Strong Assumptions: Visual Representation Learning via Temporal Differences https://temporal-difference-vision.github.io/
items.whyItMatters: 用时序差分做视觉表征学习，减少 inductive bias 的新思路。

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: 70-80% of employees using AI at work are using tools their employer never approved. Model-as-a-Service flips this. Your platform team runs one internal AI API. ... Now GA in Red Hat OpenShift AI 3.4. vLLM under the hood.
items.whyItMatters: Red Hat OpenShift AI 3.4 GA，vLLM 驱动企业私有 AI

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
new: i8 vectors

f32: 4 bytes/dim
i8: 1 byte/dim

4x fewer bytes → 75% lower storage and query costs + faster queries

when embedded with a quantization-aware model (e.g. voyage-4-large) trained on i8 vectors, recall loss can be ~0!

docs: https://turbopuffer.com/docs/performance
items.whyItMatters: 向量数据库大幅降低存储和查询成本，支持量化模型

items.author: @johnschulman2
items.text: PPO had a second wave in the LLM era for reasons unanticipated by the original paper - the importance-ratio objective fixes biases from numeric error, async training, and forward pass noise - the clipping objective affects entropy through a mechanism that we didn't know about at the time of publication (DAPO,
items.whyItMatters: PPO作者解析其在LLM RLHF中的意外持久价值与机制

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: LFM2.5-ColBERT-350M is a surprisingly reliable smart tool selector. We gave it 151 tools, and it consistently surfaces the 5 most relevant ones based on the user prompt. This saves tokens and improves accuracy. Ideal for hmmmm agentic edge models? 👀
items.whyItMatters: 350M 模型高效选 151 个工具

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: someone asked if they could try getting Laguna M.1 running on a Mac. we said yes. they came back with a 3-bit MLX build running locally on Apple Silicon: ~26 tok/s, with ~100 GB peak memory on an M3 Max with 128 GB unified.
items.whyItMatters: Laguna M.1 本地 Mac 3-bit 运行

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: IYMI: the best way to try Laguna M.1 is to jump in the pool. pool is our agent harness. It works as both an ACP server and client, so you can run M.1 as a coding agent and build with the same interface we use ourselves.
items.whyItMatters: 开源 agent harness 支持 coding agent

items.author: @steph_palazzolo
items.text: In this morning's AI Agenda, I get into Hermes, an OpenClaw alternative that's catching on with developers. https://www.theinformation.com/newsletters/ai-agenda/competitor-openclaw-emerges
items.whyItMatters: Hermes 作为 OpenClaw 替代品在开发者中流行，AI 工具新选项

items.author: @GoogleResearch
items.text: New research published in @Nature with @GoogleDeepMind shows how AMIE utilizes long-context capabilities of Gemini models to ground its clinical reasoning in authoritative medical knowledge. In a multi-visit study with patient actors, AMIE demonstrated physician-level capabilities in longitudinal management reasoning.
items.whyItMatters: Nature论文：Gemini驱动的医疗AI实现纵向疾病管理，达到医师水平。

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: New lab: Cost Simulator A simple tool for looking at your real-world traffic and estimating cost savings with different models, using median endpoint pricing
items.whyItMatters: 新工具模拟真实流量下多模型成本节省

items.author: @weaviate_io
items.text: The most requested feature from our community is finally here: Weaviate Cloud access, free 𝘧𝘰𝘳𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳. No trial period. No ticking clock. Just full access to Weaviate's vector database, query agent, and memory capabilities, no credit card required.
items.whyItMatters: Weaviate Cloud 永久免费 tier 上线

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: New on the Runway API: Recipes. Drop production-ready generative media features into your platform, with one API call. ... Create product ads from an image, swap a product in an existing video and more.
items.whyItMatters: Runway API 新增 Recipes，一键集成生产级生成媒体

items.author: @StasBekman
items.text: Added 2 sections on Python and Pytorch profilers... I have been using those massively as of recent to optimize the RL workloads, so these tools are fantastic in case you are not aware of those.
items.whyItMatters: PyTorch/RL 性能调试新指南，优化训练开销

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
we open sourced alyze, the Rust crate behind tpuf's default full-text search tokenizer (word_v4)

alyze does a bit less, but does it up to ~4x faster

https://github.com/turbopuffer/alyze
items.whyItMatters: 开源高性能全文搜索 tokenizer，加速 FTS 实现

items.author: @wandb
items.text:
We just opened it up for anyone to try. It's an early experiment... Signup: https://hivemind.wandb.tools/
GitHub: https://github.com/wandb/hivemind
items.whyItMatters: 开源多 coding agent 协作平台 HiveMind，支持隐私控制

items.author: @cartesia
items.text: Sonic-3.5 is also the #1 streaming TTS model on @voicearena_ai for notable languages including English🇺🇸, Hindi 🇮🇳, Portuguese 🇧🇷
items.whyItMatters: 多语言流式 TTS 领先，11k 盲测支持

items.author: @lmstudio
items.text: For WWDC, we worked with Apple to run Kimi K2.6, a 1T-parameter model, across a cluster of four Mac Studios using a preview version of LM Studio. We showcased secure remote access from a MacBook Neo and iPhone using LM Link. A glimpse of your own private, frontier-scale AI.
items.whyItMatters: 演示1T参数模型在消费级Mac集群上运行，展示本地前沿AI可行性

items.author: @Alibaba_Qwen
items.text: 📣 Introducing the Qwen-Robot Suite — Qwen-RobotNav, Qwen-RobotManip, Qwen-RobotWorld, three foundation models, a full stack for embodied intelligence.
items.whyItMatters: 具身智能开源模型套件，支持多机器人

items.author: @LangChain_OSS
items.text: Loops are popular right now because they're the mechanism by which you connect an agent to your ecosystem and help it improve over time. This guide covers how you can stack loops to build effective agents with @LangChain!
items.whyItMatters: LangChain 代理循环构建指南，助 AI 工程师快速落地

items.author: @XiaomiMiMo
items.text:
🚀 MiMo Claw is now live！ Flagship AI Model + Kingsoft Office Integration

🤖 Unlock the Full Power of Agents • Powered by MiMo’s flagship model... 40–60% lower token consumption
items.whyItMatters: 小米 MiMo 旗舰模型集成办公 Agent，token 消耗降低 40-60%

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text: GLM 5.2 just dropped on HF - frontier level, 1M context, MIT licensed. Run in transformers, vLLM, SGLang
items.whyItMatters: 开源前沿模型发布，支持主流推理框架，1M上下文

items.author: @JayAlammar
items.text: The 30 billion parameter mixture of experts model stacks 49 Transformer blocks... The MoE layers have 128 experts, and activate 8 for each token. Leading to 3 billion active parameters. The self-attention setup interleaves sliding window attention and full attention in 3:1 ratio.
items.whyItMatters: 详细披露30B MoE模型架构参数与注意力机制设计

items.author: @cartesia
items.text: Two new models just dropped 👀 Sonic-3.5 and Ink-2 are the #1 streaming models for text to speech and speech to text
items.whyItMatters: Sonic-3.5/Ink-2 登顶流式 TTS/STT 榜单
